title: あなたにだけは絶対に

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
You've got this, Kita!
Keep that lead!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
Sato, you're almost there! One final push!
You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd's really pumped up! It looks like
Satono Diamond and Kitasan Black are facing off
in a pick-up race.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black and Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right! Looks like victory was mine this time,
Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I lost two out of our three races. You've
been getting faster and faster lately, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you think so?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But during that first race, you completely
outpaced me to take the win.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I need to improve my focus! I'm gonna go
to the library and look up some mental training
methods!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for racing with me today, Dia! I'll catch
you later!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Sure... I'll see you later, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Right. I need to get going myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that night, noticing that the lights are still
on at the gym, I drop by to see what's happening.
Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: My apologies. Is it time for lights out already?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's still a little time left. But it's already very
late, and she's the only one here...
choice_data_list:
You have time. But aren't you pushing yourself
too hard?

You have time. But aren't you pushing yourself
too hard?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Goodness, you're such a kind soul. I'm fine, really!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But I'm in no position to best my rival... Not at
this level.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Kita was the first Umamusume to make me feel
like I was actually outmatched.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I always thought that I only needed to focus on
what was in front of me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That if I simply kept looking ahead, I could fulfill
my birthright and meet everyone's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But then...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ahead of me, Kita stepped into view.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My field of vision had always been empty, and
yet there she was.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That's why I want to surpass her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
She's straightforward, kind, and powerful. I want
to do what it takes to overtake her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sheer strength of Satono Diamond's resolve is
clear. I consider my options...
choice_data_list: Stay with her until lights out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I encourage her to focus on training hard and
promise to tell her when it's lights out.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Really? Thank you so very much!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, I need to keep pushing myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then, after Satono Diamond returns to her
training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Someone's already using the leg press
machine...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hngh... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...It appears as though I should call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without losing any focus whatsoever, Satono
Diamond continues training for a while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After warning her not to stay out too late, I let
her know that I'm leaving.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'll make sure to be mindful of the time.
Thank you very much for your kind consideration!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm about to leave, I hear a voice coming from
the racetrack. And when I take a look...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Find a target to focus on... Yeah, I think I'm
starting to get it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay, one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see what the future holds for these
two Umamusume racing toward their dreams.
